name: Dent-Knees Chicken Fried Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons, or 3 Lambrusco's red wine, or juice
recipeInstructions: The night before, place the steaks in a dish in single layers. Wipe them on both sides with an even coating of corn oil. Dust them on both sides generously with season salt. Drizzle each steak with wine or juice. Seal the dish in doubled foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate for about 24 hours prior to preparing the final dish. Remove the steaks from the fridge and coat both sides well with the Bisquick mix. Combine the butter with the oil in a large skillet until melted. Brown both sides of each steak until crispy. Transfer back to the same baking dish and seal in foil. Bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes.
